item.title: Some old news always seem both fresh and turgid rotten at the same time.
item.dc:creator: Az663

item.title: Trans Girl Tuesday
item.description:
Wanted to do another timeline post. These first few were from the beginning of June, for Pride! There was a reply chain with several trans women sharing their before and afters, and it was really cute. HRT is literally magic.
...this was just a joke, lol. Although she said she did get compared to Dylan & Cole when she was younger.

Fun stuff. Dragging ass, worked quite late, in store for another long day. Send something uplifting as fuck. Same name on discord.

item.title: He asked and I said yes
item.description: Just excited and wanting to scream from the rooftops but don't want the attention from people I actually know xD
item.dc:creator: SeaweedAV

item.title: Big Jack may be dangerous on demand, but he’s not without compassion.
item.description: Source is @petfoolery on instagram. MV edit: thanks for the fake internet points my friends. For those equating this with the CEO shooter, user @acinonyxjubatus pointed out that this was actually created several days before that. It was also pointed out that this is very in keeping with Big Jack’s character. So I’m just gonna try to appreciate a good comic and quality OC for what it is. Stay safe y’all.
item.dc:creator: Lurch1911

item.title: Anyone else?
item.description:
It's weird, because she also told him that he should expect to be sleepy and maybe a little worn out because of things coming up that he hasn't thought about for decades. Turns out she was right.
Chessie loves it when her cat-dad takes a nap on the couch.

item.title: First time catching my cake day. Hard to choose a favorite for 11 years, but I'm on my way to run the LGBTQ+ Scout Meeting I Scoutmaster for so this is the most appropriate.
item.description: In case you're wondering, the LGBTQ+ kids in my troop do crazy LGBTQ+ kid things like camp, hike, raft, community service projects, go to the beach and make fun of Nazis.

item.title: Italian pride mini-dump
item.dc:creator: ELKronos

item.title: Thursday unhinged meme dump of pure chaos #255 (trading giggles for upvotes at 2 to 1 ratio)
item.description:
1. When do you find time to play, my guys
2. Weeee
3. Something you need to understand about guys P.S. If you're feeling like that, feel free to DM me, I'm here to talk about gaming or anything else. I can give you a free game to play to put you out of the whole
4. Commercials in the 80s are wild, just walk around with a tub of American butter
5. WHAT DOES IT MEAAAAN
6. When you're an engineering student but also an alcoholic
7. Let me slip into something more sexy
8. I really like her
9. When you put Speed: 1 and Accuracy: 100 on your player creation screen
10
11
12
13
14. I truly hope that if you are checking out this dump, it's somewhere on Hawai and you're just chillin
15. :) P.S. If this dump entertained you, we probably have the same type of humor. So you also might like the wacky game I'm working on, called Do Not Press The Button (Or You Might Delete The Multiverse). Please consider a wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ And I hope you have the best-est of weeks! Feel free to DM me if you need to talk or some support because things aren't going well.
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Yes he is.
item.description:
And the people know it. Crowd funded defense Jury trial: who would convict? They would need a jury of CEOs
But Insurance company's policy is to kill people in cold blood (or slowly but surely at least). article from https://www.ctvnews.ca/world/he-is-no-hero-pennsylvania-authorities-announce-charges-against-luigi-mangione-1.7138981

item.title: The Weather Channel Slapped
item.description: Not sure why some days I'd just watch the "On the 8's" but at least there was some good music.
item.dc:creator: AvsFreak

item.title: Just sharing with the void
item.description: Haven't worked in 21 months. Running on fumes. If my mortgage forbearance isn't approved (again), I may lose my home. Chronic major depression, anxiety, and ADHD combine to prevent me from functioning. I can't think straight, I can't concentrate, I can't remember things, I can't even answer basic questions about my own job field that I've worked in for over 20 years. Totally bombed my last job interview. Declining vision makes it difficult to read code on the screen. Spinal arthritis (deteriorating vertebral discs) makes it painful to do anything at all, even sit or lie down. Trying to finish raising my 2 teens alone. Today, one of them verbally attacked me for failing to get my life back together, lamenting how THEIR graduation might be affected if we have to move. I shut down. Been sitting here for hours, mostly staring at nothing and occasionally crying or hitting myself in frustration. My cats are keeping me company at least. "Seek help." Yeah, I know, and I am. Medicaid, SNAP, I even applied for disability. Mental health care is another matter. It's like a fucking unicorn, impossible to find or hold onto. I had one session like 3 weeks ago. I have another in a week. It's not nearly enough. Don't know why I'm so broken this time. I've dealt with depression forever. I've been jobless before. But not like this. It's like my brain stopped working like it's supposed to. I can't seem to do anything.
item.dc:creator: tinydog
